title: EdgeThreshold Property
description: Sets the threshold percentage for which edges with grayscale variation below this value are ignored.
notes:
Use EdgeThreshold to reject edges along the search path with smaller grayscale variations.  During an edge search, the image along the search area is projected into one line of pixels.  Each pixel in the projection is a summation of all the pixels in the same column of the search area.  An edge value is determined for each pixel in the projection.  The EdgeThreshold allows edge values below the setting to be ignored.

See Also: EdgeThreshold Property
